author: jdthomas24
description: Custom Hubitat driver for SmartThings Zigbee motion sensors with local processing and battery reporting.
releaseNotes: v1.7.7 - configure() now only fires when relevant settings change. Toggling temperature off clears the attribute immediately. Toggling temperature on refreshes the device immediately. batteryVoltage event now only fires on change. Removed presenceTimeoutCheck stub.
